snapshot_binding.note: Derived from the retained nr04-operational-snapshot GitHub Actions artifact. Domain objects and links are reshaped for this Lab and merged at load time by engine/snapshot-adapter.js.

source_note: Real NR04 Golden Operational Universe domain objects/links imported from production snapshot contentHash=cfea7d001733e102a0f43b87ccbd68615b6760c6d4f9497647755a5149e52bbd. Namespaced with an "nr04:" id prefix so these merge into this Lab's existing curated V1-A narrative fixtures with zero id collisions.

objects.evidence_summary: Controls integration is identified as a critical NorthRiver capacity resource.

objects.evidence_summary: FAT bays is identified as a critical NorthRiver capacity resource.

objects.title: Executive Briefing Source — Week 31 commitment protection recovery plan
objects.evidence_summary: Briefing source collects customer, supplier, quality, manufacturing, logistics, service, finance, recommendation, and decision evidence for executive review.

objects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-033 — Supplier casting containment plan
objects.evidence_summary: CAPA contains supplier corrective action for Apex Foundry CPP-1000 casting porosity.
objects.next_action_summary: Validate containment lot and supplier corrective action evidence.

objects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-041 — FAT documentation standardization
objects.evidence_summary: CAPA standardizes FAT documentation controls after MPS weld-documentation gap.

objects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-047 — CPP-1000 weld process corrective action (PLT-200)
objects.evidence_summary: CAPA-NR-2026-047 opened 2026-08-26 in response to NCR-NR-2026-231 weld porosity; containment effective 2026-08-28; verification due 2026-09-08; prerequisite for FAT-NR-2026-3002 clearance.
objects.business_impact_summary: Process correction prevents recurrence on WO-NR-2026-1101 remaining welds and future CPP-1000 builds.
objects.next_action_summary: Implement digital preheat logging by 2026-09-08; validate on remaining WO-NR-2026-1101 welds before FAT-NR-2026-3002.

objects.title: Customer Commitment — Horizon LNG CPP-1000 September site-ready delivery
objects.evidence_summary: Customer commitment record ties Horizon LNG September field installation date to CPP-1000 demand DMD-NR-GOU-CPP-HORIZON-01.
objects.business_impact_summary: Missed delivery risks outage-window loss, premium freight, and executive escalation.
objects.next_action_summary: Prioritize CPP-1000 casting, ECO, machining, quality disposition, FAT, and shipment recovery.

objects.title: NorthRiver Industrial Systems
objects.evidence_summary: Living Factory Bible defines NorthRiver Industrial Systems as the canonical manufacturing enterprise for OpsConductor V1.

objects.title: CESC-NR-2026-014 — CPP-1000 commissioning delay customer escalation (Horizon LNG Partners)
objects.evidence_summary: CESC-NR-2026-014 escalation raised 2026-09-16 by Horizon LNG Partners; VP Commercial engaged; links to WAR-NR-2026-021; penalty window opens in 30 days from escalation date.
objects.business_impact_summary: Horizon LNG Partners penalty window opens in 30 days; VP Commercial and SVC-400 must deliver field resolution or formal recovery plan.
objects.next_action_summary: Deliver CPP-1000 alignment assessment results to Horizon LNG Partners project director by 2026-09-22; confirm warranty claim disposition.

objects.title: ECO-NR-2026-071 — CPP-1000 bearing housing revision
objects.evidence_summary: Engineering change updates CPP-1000 bearing housing interface before Pueblo machining release.
objects.business_impact_summary: Prevents rework on CPP-1000 September customer builds.
objects.next_action_summary: Release ECN before final machining traveler issue.

objects.title: ECO-NR-2026-084 — LCM-5000 controls panel layout update
objects.evidence_summary: Engineering change updates LCM-5000 control panel layout before controls integration.

objects.title: ECO-NR-2026-091 — CPP-1000 cryogenic pump shaft geometry revision ECO
objects.evidence_summary: ECO-NR-2026-091 issued to revise CPP-1000 shaft bore tolerance; gates WO-NR-2026-1101 machining release; closed after drawing release confirmed at Apex Foundry Group.
objects.business_impact_summary: Revised shaft spec unblocks CPP-1000 machining; critical path for Horizon LNG Partners September delivery.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm effectivity with Apex Foundry Group; release revised drawings to PLT-200 machining.

objects.title: ECO-NR-2026-092 — MPS-4000 cooling manifold BOM revision ECO
objects.evidence_summary: ECO-NR-2026-092 issued 2026-08-20 to qualify CPF-MANIFOLD-ALT-003 substitute on MPS-4000 BOM; closed 2026-08-30 after qualification records archived.
objects.business_impact_summary: BOM alignment prevents procurement delay on MPS-4000 cooling manifold; low schedule risk.
objects.next_action_summary: Archive substitute qualification records; close purchasing notes on open MPS-4000 work orders.

objects.title: ECO-NR-GOU-099 — CPP-1000 impeller clearance tolerance update
objects.evidence_summary: Engineering released CPP-1000 impeller clearance update to allow contained rework on affected casting lot.

objects.title: FAT-NR-2026-3001 — CPS-3000 factory acceptance test (PLT-300 Grand Junction)
objects.evidence_summary: FAT-NR-2026-3001 planned 2026-09-01; readiness confirmed 2026-09-04; execution due 2026-09-07 to protect CPS-3000 Catalyst Chemical shipment window.
objects.business_impact_summary: FAT sign-off gates CPS-3000 shipment to Catalyst Chemical; customer witness availability is the constraint.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm WO-NR-2026-1102 fabrication completion; schedule Catalyst Chemical witness for FAT week.

objects.title: FAT-NR-2026-3002 — CPP-1000 cryogenic factory acceptance test (PLT-300 Grand Junction)
objects.evidence_summary: FAT-NR-2026-3002 planned 2026-09-03; readiness review 2026-09-06; cryogenic FAT requires CAPA-NR-2026-047 weld process verification as a prerequisite.
objects.business_impact_summary: FAT is the final quality gate before CPP-1000 shipment to Horizon LNG Partners; CAPA verification is a prerequisite.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm CAPA-NR-2026-047 verification completion; arrange cryogenic test media; schedule Horizon LNG witness.

objects.title: Revenue Exposure — Horizon, Catalyst, and Atlas September commitments
objects.evidence_summary: Finance exposure rollup ties demand values, premium freight, penalty exposure, and margin erosion to the September recovery plan.
objects.business_impact_summary: At-risk revenue plus avoidable expedite and penalty exposure creates executive-level prioritization signal.

objects.title: MRB-NR-GOU-117 — Use-as-is with engineering-approved rework traveler
objects.evidence_summary: MRB approved controlled rework against ECO-NR-GOU-099 for the quarantined CPP-1000 casting set.

objects.title: NCR-NR-2026-218 — CPP casting porosity at incoming inspection
objects.evidence_summary: Incoming inspection identified porosity on CPP-1000 casting lot from Apex Foundry Group.
objects.next_action_summary: MRB disposition required before machining queue release.

objects.title: NCR-NR-2026-231 — CPP-1000 weld sub-assembly inspection failure (PLT-200)
objects.evidence_summary: NCR-NR-2026-231 raised 2026-08-18; radiographic porosity on CPP-1000 outlet nozzle weld; MRB disposition repair-in-place; closed 2026-08-29 after re-inspection pass.
objects.business_impact_summary: Weld repair adds approximately 5 days to CPP-1000 sub-assembly; impacts FAT-NR-2026-3002 schedule.
objects.next_action_summary: Complete weld repair per CAPA-NR-2026-047 containment; re-inspect to close NCR.

objects.title: NCR-NR-2026-244 — MPS skid weld documentation gap
objects.evidence_summary: Quality record identified missing weld documentation before Frontier Mining MPS-4000 FAT.

objects.title: NCR-NR-GOU-301 — CPP-1000 casting dimensional nonconformance
objects.evidence_summary: NCR records dimensional nonconformance on one received CPP-1000 casting set; MRB must decide rework versus replacement.

objects.evidence_summary: PLT-100 is listed in the NorthRiver plant directory as Engineering & Product Development Center.

objects.title: PO-NR-2026-4501 line 10 — Apex Foundry CPP castings
objects.evidence_summary: Purchase order line covers CPP-1000 casting supply from Apex Foundry Group.

objects.title: PO-NR-2026-4502 line 20 — Quantum Controls LCM panels
objects.evidence_summary: Purchase order line covers controls hardware required for LCM-5000 liquid cooling modules.

objects.title: PO-NR-2026-4503 line 10 — Dynamic Seal PPS seal sets
objects.evidence_summary: Purchase order line covers seal sets supporting PPS-2000 process pump system builds.

objects.title: PO-NR-2026-4611:10 — CPS-3000 large frame forging purchase order (Summit Forge Works)
objects.evidence_summary: PO-NR-2026-4611:10 placed with Summit Forge Works for CPS-3000 large-frame forgings; acknowledged 2026-08-11; due at PLT-200 by 2026-08-24.
objects.business_impact_summary: CPS-3000 forging arrival gates WO-NR-2026-1102 fabrication start at Pueblo.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm Summit Forge Works shipment ETD; expedite if forge-line maintenance extends past 2026-08-20.

objects.title: NorthRiver Customer Commitment Value Stream
objects.evidence_summary: The Living Factory Bible defines NorthRiver customer commitments as flowing from opportunity through service lifecycle.

objects.title: Recommendation Context — Protect Horizon CPP-1000 through recovery machining and premium freight
objects.evidence_summary: Scenario context links shortage recommendation evidence to supplier delay, ECO, NCR, MRB, machining bottleneck, and shipment recovery actions.

objects.title: Service RMA-NR-GOU-014 — Helios CPP-1000 startup vibration evidence
objects.evidence_summary: Service case provides field evidence that CPP vibration issue may be related to the same impeller tolerance family as ECO-NR-GOU-099.

objects.title: SHP-NR-2026-7011 — CPP-1000 outbound shipment to Horizon LNG Partners
objects.evidence_summary: SHP-NR-2026-7011 planned 2026-09-08; staged at Grand Junction 2026-09-12; carrier pickup due 2026-09-14 for Horizon LNG Partners delivery; gates on FAT-NR-2026-3002 sign-off.
objects.business_impact_summary: CPP-1000 delivery to Horizon LNG Partners is the primary September commitment; any delay incurs SLA exposure.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm FAT-NR-2026-3002 sign-off date; book cryogenic transport carrier; prepare shipping documentation.

objects.title: SHP-NR-2026-7012 — CPS-3000 outbound shipment to Catalyst Chemical
objects.evidence_summary: SHP-NR-2026-7012 planned 2026-09-10; staged 2026-09-13; awaiting FAT-NR-2026-3001 sign-off before carrier pickup for Catalyst Chemical delivery.
objects.business_impact_summary: CPS-3000 delivery to Catalyst Chemical on September commit; FAT witness schedule is the upstream dependency.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm FAT-NR-2026-3001 witness availability; obtain oversized load permit; arrange flatbed freight.

objects.title: SHP-NR-2026-9921 — CPP-1000 shipment to Horizon LNG
objects.evidence_summary: Shipment record reserves Grand Junction shipping window for Horizon LNG CPP-1000 demand.

objects.title: SHP-NR-2026-9934 — LCM-5000 shipment to Atlas Data Infrastructure
objects.evidence_summary: Shipment record reserves Grand Junction shipping window for Atlas Data Infrastructure LCM-5000 demand.

objects.title: Shipment SHP-NR-GOU-6101 — Horizon LNG CPP-1000 premium freight reservation
objects.evidence_summary: Premium freight reservation protects Horizon LNG outage-window delivery if CPP machining recovery finishes by 2026-08-20.

objects.title: Executive Signal — September customer commitment risk rising across CPP, CPS, and LCM programs
objects.evidence_summary: Executive operating review recorded multi-program September commitment risk requiring cross-functional recovery plan.
objects.business_impact_summary: At-risk customer commitments total more than $1.8M across critical September shipments.
objects.next_action_summary: Open Golden Story investigation and validate shortage, supplier, engineering, quality, manufacturing, logistics, service, finance, recommendation, and decision evidence.

objects.evidence_summary: Apex Foundry Group notified NorthRiver that CPP-1000 casting shipment moves from 2026-07-28 to 2026-08-02 after furnace maintenance overrun.

objects.title: SUPQ-NR-2026-051 — CPP-1000 shaft casting dimensional non-conformance (Apex Foundry Group)
objects.evidence_summary: Apex Foundry Group CPP-1000 shaft casting dimensional non-conformance confirmed by incoming inspection at PLT-200; corrective ECO-NR-2026-091 triggered.
objects.business_impact_summary: Delays CPP-1000 machining at Pueblo; puts Horizon LNG Partners September commitment at risk.
objects.next_action_summary: Await ECO-NR-2026-091 disposition; evaluate MRB containment for non-conforming batch.

objects.title: WAR-NR-2026-017 — AquaGrid PPS seal leakage warranty case
objects.evidence_summary: Warranty case records AquaGrid PPS-2000 seal leakage feedback routed to Service, Quality, and Engineering.

objects.title: WAR-NR-2026-021 — CPP-1000 field installation warranty case (Horizon LNG Partners)
objects.evidence_summary: WAR-NR-2026-021 opened 2026-09-15; Horizon LNG Partners CPP-1000 vibration during commissioning; SVC-400 field assessment started 2026-09-18; preliminary finding points to installation alignment deviation.
objects.business_impact_summary: Unresolved warranty issue with Horizon LNG Partners during active commissioning creates relationship and revenue risk.
objects.next_action_summary: Complete site alignment assessment; provide field alignment report by 2026-09-22; close warranty case if alignment confirmed.

objects.title: WAR-NR-2026-024 — Helios CPP startup vibration support case
objects.evidence_summary: Warranty support case records Helios Hydrogen CPP-1000 startup vibration investigation.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1001 — CPP-1000 Pueblo machining release
objects.evidence_summary: Work order releases CPP-1000 Pueblo machining activity tied to Horizon LNG September demand.
objects.business_impact_summary: Protects CPP-1000 September customer delivery window.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm large-frame machining slot and inspection availability.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1002 — PPS-2000 fabrication and welding
objects.evidence_summary: Work order covers PPS-2000 fabrication and certified welding at Pueblo for AquaGrid September demand.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1003 — MPS-4000 Grand Junction integration
objects.evidence_summary: Grand Junction integration work order supports Frontier Mining modular process skid demand.
objects.next_action_summary: Sequence controls integration before FAT bay reservation.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1101 — CPP-1000 revised shaft machining work order (PLT-200 Pueblo)
objects.evidence_summary: WO-NR-2026-1101 released 2026-08-10 after ECO-NR-2026-091 effectivity; machining complete 2026-09-02; NCR-NR-2026-231 raised on weld sub-assembly during execution.
objects.business_impact_summary: Critical path for CPP-1000 Horizon LNG Partners September commitment; delay cascades to FAT and shipment.
objects.next_action_summary: Complete weld sub-assembly after CAPA-NR-2026-047 containment; release to FAT-NR-2026-3002.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1102 — CPS-3000 large frame fabrication and certified welding (PLT-200 Pueblo)
objects.evidence_summary: WO-NR-2026-1102 released 2026-08-12; awaiting CPS-3000 forgings from PO-NR-2026-4611:10; feeds FAT-NR-2026-3001 at Grand Junction.
objects.business_impact_summary: Fabrication must complete before Grand Junction FAT slot; forging arrival from Summit Forge Works is upstream dependency.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm forging arrival from PO-NR-2026-4611:10; initiate fabrication once forgings cleared.

objects.title: WO-NR-GOU-2101 — CPP-1000 Pueblo recovery machining
objects.evidence_summary: Pueblo recovery machining work order requires partial receipt, ECO release, and MRB disposition before full release.
objects.business_impact_summary: Critical path for Horizon LNG CPP-1000 commitment.
